content: <path class="wgvb2s ydovum"/><circle class="kqeuxs unuj2t ydovum"/><circle class="if5-bf kqeuxs ydovum"/>

animations.wgvb2s: stroke-dasharray:52;animation:0s forwards fill-to-0, 0.6s linear forwards so-from-52, 0.15s linear 0.6s forwards fill-to-0_3;
animations.unuj2t: animation:0s forwards r-to-0px, 0.2s linear 0.85s forwards r-to-2px;
animations.if5-bf: animation:0s forwards r-to-0px, 0.2s linear 1.05s forwards r-to-2px;
